finalValidation.heading: Final validation
finalValidation.subheading: All report drafts. By default, only those ready to submit are shown.

actions.heading: Final decision
actions.hint: Final validation is available when every step is approved by the quality checker (ready-to-submit status). To request a global revision, save your per-step comments first.

status.globalCycleClosed: Global revision #{{revision}} approved by the {{role}}. No further global revision is possible. Only the super-admin can finalize this draft.
status.globalCycleOpenPendingSa: Global revision #{{revision}} in progress — your decision is required before final validation.
status.globalCycleOpen: Global revision #{{revision}} in progress — awaiting QC / super-admin decisions.
status.readyNoGlobalYet: Draft ready to submit. You may request a global revision (once) or finalize the draft.
status.awaitingReady: Final validation is unavailable until the draft is ready to submit.
status.submitted: Draft already submitted to the program.

actions.approveDisabledTitle: Requires ready-to-submit status and Final step approved by the quality checker
actions.revisionDisabledTitle: Save at least one super-admin comment before requesting revision
actions.revisionAlreadyUsedTitle: Global revision was already requested once for this report
actions.pendingGlobalReviewHint: A global submission is awaiting review (QC or super-admin) before you can finalize the report.

comments.intro: One general comment per step. The team (hunter, mentor, quality checker) reads them in the “Super-admin feedback” tab.
